buildCommand: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
installCommand: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm ci --prefix backend

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.supabase.co https://nian-storage.vercel.app; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com;
